# 🎨 Favilla Blaze — Illustration Prompts for Leonardo.ai
*Auto-generated from 91 unique scenes across 16 episodes*

## ⚙️ Leonardo.ai Configuration

| Setting | Value |
|---|---|
| **Model** | Leonardo Lightning XL |
| **Style Preset** | Illustration / Cinematic |
| **Resolution** | 1216 x 832 (landscape comic panel) |
| **Steps** | 20-25 (Lightning optimized) |
| **Guidance Scale** | 7.0 |
| **Negative Prompts** | See below |
| **Format** | WEBP (lossless from PNG) |

### Universal Negative Prompt
```
photorealistic, 3D render, anime, manga, chibi, deformed, blurry, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, distorted face, ugly, low quality
```

### 💰 Cost Optimization Tips
- Use **Lightning XL** over standard models (~4x cheaper, faster)
- Generate **single image per prompt** (batch=1) — each panel has unique framing
- Resolution **1216x832** is the sweet spot for mobile comic panels
- **20 steps** is sufficient for Lightning models
- Reuse prompts for scenes with the same location/characters but different action
- Estimated cost: ~1 credit per image on Lightning XL (vs 4-8 on standard)

### 🎯 Character Consistency Strategy
1. Generate **Favilla reference sheet** first: portrait, full body, expressions
2. Use Leonardo's **Image Guidance** with the reference for subsequent generations
3. Keep the **same seed** for scenes within the same episode
4. Generate all pages of one episode in the **same session** for style coherence

---
**Total unique scenes:** 91
**Estimated credits (Lightning XL):** ~91 credits
